title: Yaaro Yaaro Lyrics Savaale Samaali Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Savaale Samaali Yaaro Yaaro Song Lyrics
Singer(s): M. M. Manasi
Music: Thaman

Yaaro Yaaro
niththam yaaro
kalvan kalvan undhan pero.
unnai kandaal ullam yaeno
thullum thullum yaeno yaeno.

Boomi melae saami pola
vandhu nindraai
nee yaaro
un mugavari tharuvaayaa.

Theekul ennai
nirkka vaiththu
petrol ooththi ne ponal
naan engae thappi selveno.

idiyaaga ennai thaakki
ponaaye neeye neeye.
mazhayaaga ennai nenaithu
ponaaye yeno yen ?

Azhagaale yudham seidhu
alaimodha vaithaai neeye
analaaga ennai modhi
kondraai neeye.

Boomi melae saami pola
vandhu nindraai
nee yaaro
un mugavari tharuvaayaa.

Undhan velvettu kannaale
vetti saaikindraai.
Ennai naai kutti polethaan
meikindraaye.

Yaaro Yaaro
niththam yaaro
kalvan kalvan undhan pero.
unnai kandaal ullam yaeno
thullum thullum yaeno yaeno.

Naan paartha aangal
oru kodi thaandum,
aanaalum unai pol
yaarum illaye.

Enai paartha aangal
pala kadi thaandum
aanaalum unai pol paarkavillaye.

Un azhagaale enai kolla
kadavul ninaithaano.
illai enakkaaga
unai vaazha sonnaanodaa..

Yaaro Yaaro
niththam yaaro
kalvan kalvan undhan pero.
unnai kandaal ullam yaeno
thullum thullum yaeno yaeno.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yaaro Yaaro'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, expressing the emotions of yearning for a beloved.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Savaale Samaali'?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in the film, highlighting the protagonist's feelings towards their love interest.

Who is the singer of 'Yaaro Yaaro'?

The song is sung by the talented Manasi MM, known for her soulful voice.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Yaaro Yaaro' was composed by Thaman S, a prominent music director in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Yaaro Yaaro' released?

The song was released on March 28, 2015, as part of the movie Savaale Samaali.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Yaaro Yaaro', the protagonist expresses deep emotions of love and longing, beautifully encapsulated through the soothing melody. The song serves as a backdrop to a significant moment in the film, where feelings of affection and desire come to the forefront. With heartfelt lyrics and a captivating tune, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. This enchanting piece resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaaro Yaaro from Savaale Samaali is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With Manasi MM's enchanting vocals and Thaman S's captivating music, this song creates an emotional landscape that resonates deeply. Dive into this romantic ballad that perfectly blends heartfelt lyrics with a soothing tune, making it a must-listen for any music lover.
stanzaMeanings: Who are you? Every day, who is the thief? When I see you, my heart feels like it's jumping around.
Like a god standing on the earth, who are you? Will you give me your face?
You have made me stand still, pouring petrol on me. If you leave, where will I go wrong?
You have pushed me away like a thorn. You seem to have thought of me like rain, why?
You have fought beautifully and created a storm. You have taken me away like a wave.
Like a god standing on the earth, who are you? Will you give me your face?
Even the universe cannot push me away. It has blown away the flowers.
Even the heart does not desire anything. The gaze has turned into a burden.
With your beautiful eyes, you are tearing me apart. You are making me feel like a dog.
When I see you, I feel like I have received a fortune, but there is no one like you.
When I see you, I feel like I have faced many troubles, but no one can look like you.
Did God think of taking me with your beauty? No, I just said to live for you.
Who are you? Every day, who is the thief? When I see you, my heart feels like it's jumping around.
